Poker Hand #RC1000005: Hold'em No Limit ($0.01/$0.02) - 2026/05/21 03:02:00
Table 'TestTable' 6-max Seat #1 is the button
Seat 1: Hero ($2 in chips)
Seat 2: Villain1 ($2 in chips)
Hero: posts small blind $0.01
Villain1: posts big blind $0.02
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to Hero [As Ah]
Hero: raises $1.99 to $2 and is all-in
Villain1: calls $1.98 and is all-in
Hero: shows [As Ah] (a pair of Aces)
Villain1: shows [Kc Kd] (a pair of Kings)
*** FLOP *** [7d 2c 5h]
*** TURN *** [7d 2c 5h] [9s]
*** RIVER *** [7d 2c 5h 9s] [3c]
*** SHOWDOWN ***
Hero collected $4 from pot
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot $4 | Rake $0 | Jackpot $0 | Bingo $0 | Fortune $0 | Tax $0
Board [7d 2c 5h 9s 3c]
Seat 1: Hero (button) (small blind) showed [As Ah] and won ($4) with a pair of Aces
Seat 2: Villain1 (big blind) showed [Kc Kd] and lost with a pair of Kings
